decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to generate a large amount of card draw and mana ramp through enchantments, while also utilizing the synergy between enchantress creatures and enchantments. The deck aims to create a lockout situation for the opponent using cards like Solitary Confinement and Parallax Wave, while also being able to win the game quickly with cards like Opalescence and Words of War. The deck focuses on creating a powerful board state and overwhelming the opponent with a quick combo finish.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by disrupting the opponent's hand and board state with cards like Duress, Cabal Therapy, Innocent Blood, and Contamination. The deck also aims to generate card advantage and board presence through cards like Nether Spirit, Skeletal Scrying, and Zombie Infestation. With lockdown cards like Powder Keg and Engineered Plague, the deck aims to grind out the opponent and slowly chip away at their resources while protecting its own board with Mishra's Factory and Rishadan Port.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a variety of aggressive creatures while disrupting their strategy with hand disruption spells like Duress and Cabal Therapy. The deck is designed to put pressure on the opponent early on and maintain board presence with cards like Birds of Paradise and Wall of Blossoms. Cards like Recurring Nightmare and Survival of the Fittest enable the player to continuously recur powerful creatures from the graveyard, giving them a constant stream of threats to deal with. The deck aims to win through a combination of early aggression and a resilient creature base.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creature threats like Wild Mongrel and Basking Rootwalla, supported by cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The key combo of the deck involves using Survival of the Fittest to search for key creatures like Krovikan Horror and Arrogant Wurm, while also utilizing Zombie Infestation to create a steady stream of zombie tokens for additional pressure. With a blend of efficient creatures and disruptive spells, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and resilient aggro strategy.

The focus of this BW Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's strategy through a combination of removal spells, hand disruption, and land destruction. The deck aims to control the game by using cards like Swords to Plowshares, Duress, Vindicate, and Gerrard's Verdict to manage threats on the board and in the opponent's hand. The deck also has ways to generate card advantage with Skeletal Scrying and Decree of Justice, while utilizing Eternal Dragon and Exalted Angel as finishers. Additionally, the inclusion of Dust Bowl provides a way to disrupt the opponent's mana base.

The deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures and disrupting the opponent's hand with cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy. It also includes removal spells like Smother and Snuff Out to deal with threats on the board. The deck aims to control the game by putting pressure on the opponent early with creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Nantuko Shade, while also maintaining card advantage with Phyrexian Arena. The combination of disruptive elements, removal, and aggressive creatures creates a powerful and adaptable strategy against a variety of opponents.

The main idea of this deck is to utilize the combo of Replenish, Opalescence, and Parallax Tide/Wave to control the board and overwhelm the opponent with a massive army of enchantment creatures. By cycling through your deck with cards like Frantic Search and Attunement, as well as using Intuition to tutor for key pieces, you can set up your combo quickly and efficiently. Cards like Swords to Plowshares and Tsabo's Web help to disrupt your opponent's strategy, while Seal of Cleansing provides additional removal options. This deck aims to win through a powerful and synergistic combo strategy.

The main strategy of this deck is to use the powerful combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to quickly overwhelm opponents. By combining counterspells and bounce effects like Chain of Vapor, the deck can control the game and protect its key pieces. The inclusion of cards like Powder Keg and Parallax Tide provide additional utility and disruption. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while assembling its own combo pieces for a decisive victory.

The focus of this deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's plays while generating card advantage through various spells and abilities. Using counterspells and removal, along with efficient creatures like Morphling, the deck aims to outlast and outmaneuver the opponent. The inclusion of land destruction like Dust Bowl and mana denial with Quicksand adds another layer of control to the strategy. By efficiently managing resources and leveraging card advantage, Mono Blue Control seeks to grind out a win through superior card quality and board control.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by managing the opponent's threats and resource advantage through counterspells, removal spells, and board wipes. It utilizes Standstill as a key card to slow down the game and draw cards, while also using land destruction with Dust Bowl and Parallax Tide to keep the opponent on the back foot. The deck aims to establish a strong board presence with efficient creatures like Mishra's Factory and Faerie Conclave, while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Stifle and Seal of Cleansing.

The Mono Black Aggro deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of efficient creatures and disruptive spells. By utilizing cards like Hypnotic Specter and Ravenous Rats to apply pressure, along with removal spells like Smother and Snuff Out to control the board, the deck aims to create a fast-paced and aggressive game plan. With cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress to strip away the opponent's resources, and Phyrexian Arena for card advantage, the deck aims to win the game quickly and decisively.

The deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with enchantments, such as Parallax Wave and Parallax Tide, utilizing cards like Attunement and Frantic Search to achieve this. Once the graveyard is full, Replenish is used to bring back all enchantments into play, including Opalescence to turn them into creatures. The deck also includes control elements like Mana Leak and Seal of Cleansing to protect the combo. With efficient mana sources like Ancient Tomb, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful enchantment-based combo.

The main concept of this deck is to be aggressive and fast, overwhelming the opponent with early creatures like Jackal Pup, Mogg Fanatic, and Grim Lavamancer. Quirion Dryad grows in power with each spell played, becoming a powerful threat. Removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate help clear the way for attacks. Call of the Herd provides additional creatures, while Seal of Fire can be used as removal or direct damage. The mana base includes fetch lands and utility lands like Wasteland to support the aggressive game plan.

This deck focuses on aggressive and fast-paced gameplay, aiming to overwhelm the opponent with early creature and burn spells. The key strategy involves dealing quick and consistent damage to the opponent while efficiently removing any threats they may have on the board. By utilizing a low mana curve and a mix of direct damage spells and efficient creatures, this deck aims to maintain pressure and close out the game as quickly as possible before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on maintaining board control and slowing down opponents with a mix of counterspells, creature removal, and disruptive creatures like Meddling Mage and Ramosian Sergeant. The strategy revolves around using Standstill to limit opponents' actions while building up a strong board presence with creatures like Exalted Angel and Savannah Lions. The inclusion of Armageddon and Wasteland provides additional disruption by limiting opponents' resources. The deck aims to outlast opponents and secure victory through careful resource management and strategic play.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively play creatures with Madness abilities, allowing for quick and efficient plays that put pressure on the opponent. By utilizing cards like Aquamoeba, Wild Mongrel, and Basking Rootwalla, the deck aims to quickly fill the board with threats and outpace the opponent. The deck also includes support cards like Circular Logic and Daze to disrupt the opponent's plans and protect its own creatures. Overall, the focus is on fast, aggressive gameplay and overwhelming the opponent with early aggression.
